records.ety: [L. legibilis, fr. legere to read: cf. OF. legible. See Legend.]

defs: Capable of being read or deciphered; distinct to the eye; plain; -- used of writing or printing; as, a fair, legible manuscript.
quotes: The stone with moss and lichens so overspread, Nothing is legible but the name alone.

defs: Capable of being discovered or understood by apparent marks or indications; as, the thoughts of men are often legible in their countenances.
